contentPattern.structure: icon + bold title + optional subtitle line + description paragraph, in a responsive grid on a colored (blue) band

suitableFor: ad landing icon feature grids on a brand-colored background (e.g. 'Connecting Your AI Ecosystem', 'Our Services')
3-to-7 item capability/service grids with icon + title + description
icon-led offering summaries where the section background is a solid brand color
notSuitableFor: small icon + one-word label tiles (use cards-tech-stack)
